inputs.label: Revenue
inputs.businessContext: Total revenue from sales or services

businessContext_i18n.en: Total revenue from sales or services
businessContext_i18n.tr: Satış veya hizmetlerden elde edilen toplam gelir

inputs.label: Operating Expenses
inputs.businessContext: Total operating expenses including depreciation and amortization

businessContext_i18n.en: Total operating expenses including depreciation and amortization
businessContext_i18n.tr: Amortisman ve itfa dahil toplam faaliyet giderleri

inputs.label: Depreciation & Amortization
inputs.businessContext: Non-cash depreciation and amortization expense included in operating expenses

businessContext_i18n.en: Non-cash depreciation and amortization expense included in operating expenses
businessContext_i18n.tr: Faaliyet giderlerine dahil nakdi olmayan amortisman ve itfa gideri

inputs.label: Tax Rate
inputs.businessContext: Corporate tax rate as a decimal (e.g., 0.20 for 20%)

businessContext_i18n.en: Corporate tax rate as a decimal (e.g., 0.20 for 20%)
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kurumlar vergisi oranı ondalık olarak (ör. %20 için 0,20)

inputs.label: Capital Expenditures (CapEx)
inputs.businessContext: Investment in fixed assets such as property, plant, and equipment

businessContext_i18n.en: Investment in fixed assets such as property, plant, and equipment
businessContext_i18n.tr: Maddi duran varlıklar gibi sabit varlıklara yatırım

inputs.label: Change in Working Capital
inputs.businessContext: Increase in net working capital (current assets minus current liabilities)

businessContext_i18n.en: Increase in net working capital (current assets minus current liabilities)
businessContext_i18n.tr: Net işletme sermayesindeki artış (dönen varlıklar eksi kısa vadeli yükümlülükler)
